message.en:
"a1e0547 build: remove foojay toolchain resolver configuration
25cf987 build(gradle): update gradle wrapper distribution url to 8.13
b2dc632 build(gradle): downgrade gradle and java toolchain versions
e9de714 feat(ui): implement responsive layout and adaptive navigation
791ca96 build(android): remove hardcoded buildToolsVersion
be1a231 build: clean up gradle configuration and remove redundant code
71eb596 feat(widgets): allow hiding confirm button in app dialogs
0ad8307 build: enforce JVM 17 across all java and kotlin tasks
07ef16e build(android): downgrade java version to 17
a51bbaf build(deps): migrate to flutter_jailbreak_detection_plus and update lottie
e669546 feat(ui): add entrance animations and update dependencies
4dd646a feat(security): implement root and jailbreak detection
cf38025 Merge remote-tracking branch origin/main
c9019e9 docs(readme): update content structure and add contribution guidelines
065ba23 chore: update versionarte.json and changelog to v0.6.1
"
message.vi: Chúng tôi đang bảo trì hệ thống. Vui lòng quay lại sau!
